trace.sql: SELECT SUM(net_amount) AS total_revenue FROM order_items;

SELECT SUM(oi.net_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our revenue broken down by customer region?

trace.sql:
SELECT c.region, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY c.region
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

SELECT c.region, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY c.region
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

records.question: How much revenue came from orders shipped by FedEx?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM shipments s
JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE s.carrier = 'FedEx';

WITH fedex_orders AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id
    FROM shipments s
    JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE s.carrier = 'FedEx' AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
)
SELECT SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN fedex_orders f ON oi.order_id = f.order_id;

WITH order_revenue AS (
    SELECT order_id, SUM(net_amount) AS revenue
    FROM order_items
    GROUP BY order_id
),
fedex_orders AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id
    FROM shipments s
    JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE s.carrier = 'FedEx' AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
)
SELECT SUM(orv.revenue) AS revenue
FROM order_revenue orv
JOIN fedex_orders f ON orv.order_id = f.order_id;

records.question: What is the total quantity of items sold, grouped by shipping carrier?

trace.sql:
SELECT s.carrier, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM shipments s
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = s.order_id
GROUP BY s.carrier
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

SELECT s.carrier, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM shipments s
JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY s.carrier
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

WITH order_qty AS (
    SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS qty
    FROM order_items
    GROUP BY order_id
)
SELECT s.carrier, SUM(oq.qty) AS total_quantity
FROM shipments s
JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN order_qty oq ON oq.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY s.carrier
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

records.question: Which three regions generated the most revenue?

trace.sql:
SELECT c.region, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY c.region
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

SELECT c.region, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY c.region
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

records.question: How many orders have we received?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our average revenue per order?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT status) statuses, COUNT(*) total_orders, COUNT(deleted_at) deleted FROM orders
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT o.status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) orders, SUM(oi.net_amount) revenue
FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY o.status

records.question: What is our total revenue from completed orders?

trace.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY status

SELECT SUM(oi.net_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
AND o.status = 'completed'

records.question: How many items were shipped via UPS?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity, COUNT(*) AS item_rows
FROM order_items oi
JOIN shipments s ON oi.order_id = s.order_id
WHERE s.carrier = 'UPS';

SELECT SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity, COUNT(*) AS item_rows
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE s.carrier = 'UPS';

WITH ups_orders AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT s.order_id
    FROM shipments s
    JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE s.carrier = 'UPS' AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
),
item_totals AS (
    SELECT oi.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty
    FROM order_items oi
    GROUP BY oi.order_id
)
SELECT SUM(it.qty) AS total_quantity
FROM item_totals it
JOIN ups_orders u ON it.order_id = u.order_id;

SELECT DISTINCT s.order_id
FROM shipments s
JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE s.carrier = 'UPS' AND o.deleted_at IS NULL;

WITH ups_orders AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT s.order_id AS oid
    FROM shipments s
    JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
    WHERE s.carrier = 'UPS' AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
)
SELECT SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM order_items oi
WHERE oi.order_id IN (SELECT oid FROM ups_orders);

records.question: Which shipping carrier handled the most orders?

trace.sql:
SELECT carrier, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count
FROM shipments
GROUP BY carrier
ORDER BY order_count DESC;

records.question: What is our revenue per region, for completed orders only?

trace.sql:
SELECT c.region, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY c.region
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

SELECT c.region, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
  AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY c.region
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

records.question: How many distinct customers have placed an order?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our revenue per shipping carrier?

trace.sql:
SELECT s.carrier, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM shipments s
JOIN order_items oi ON s.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY s.carrier
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

SELECT s.carrier, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM shipments s
JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY s.carrier
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

WITH order_revenue AS (
  SELECT order_id, SUM(net_amount) AS revenue
  FROM order_items
  GROUP BY order_id
)
SELECT s.carrier, SUM(orr.revenue) AS revenue
FROM shipments s
JOIN orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN order_revenue orr ON orr.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY s.carrier
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

records.question: How much revenue has each product generated?

trace.sql:
SELECT product_id, SUM(net_amount) AS revenue
FROM order_items
GROUP BY product_id
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

SELECT oi.product_id, SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY oi.product_id
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

records.question: What is our total revenue, counting only orders that were actually shipped?

trace.sql:
SELECT
  SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue_all_shipped,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.deleted_at IS NULL THEN oi.net_amount END) AS revenue_shipped_not_deleted
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.order_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT order_id FROM shipments);

WITH shipped_orders AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT order_id FROM shipments
),
valid_orders AS (
  SELECT order_id FROM orders
  WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
    AND order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM shipped_orders)
)
SELECT SUM(oi.net_amount) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
WHERE oi.order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM valid_orders);

WITH order_revenue AS (
  SELECT order_id, SUM(net_amount) AS amount
  FROM order_items
  GROUP BY order_id
)
SELECT SUM(orr.amount) AS revenue
FROM order_revenue orr
JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = orr.order_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE s.order_id = o.order_id);

records.question: What is the average number of shipments per order?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_shipments, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS orders_with_shipments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) AS total_orders FROM shipments;

SELECT COUNT(s.shipment_id) AS total_shipments, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, COUNT(s.shipment_id)*1.0/COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS avg_shipments_per_order FROM orders o LEFT JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL;
